visual_attributes.morphology: Spherical or pear-shaped with fuzzy edges
visual_attributes.size_and_scale: 1–100 cm in diameter, most commonly 10–20 cm
visual_attributes.structural_arrangement: Evenly lit with possible rotational motion

domain_specific_visual.LUMINOSITY: Brightness similar to a domestic lamp
domain_specific_visual.MOTION_PATTERN: Erratic, can hover or move horizontally

domain_specific_functional.INTERACTION_WITH_OBJECTS: Can be attracted to or repelled by metal objects

relationships.description: Ball lightning is distinct from St. Elmo's fire despite visual similarities

contextual_attributes.origin: Global, with historical accounts from Europe and South America
contextual_attributes.historical_period: Documented since at least the 12th century
contextual_attributes.cultural_significance: Source of myths and legends, such as the Anchimayen
